notes: PLAN-001 completed (MCP + session isolation). PLAN-002 stale. PLAN-003 done (dogfood). PLAN-004 completed (context-window guard). PLAN-005 completed (smart multi-provider routing). PLAN-006 completed (UI provider and model control). PLAN-007 completed (audit hardening). PLAN-008 completed (E2E testing). PLAN-009 completed (GitHub Pages + command-aware routing). PLAN-010 completed (cross-platform release pipeline + download landing page). PLAN-011 completed (industry-grade hardening). PLAN-012 completed (semantic versioning + MIT license + zig CI fix). PLAN-013 completed (update CI to latest action versions). PLAN-014 completed (unified publish.yml pipeline, fixed GITHUB_TOKEN cross-trigger bug, fixed CLI/desktop artifact naming collision, updated downloads.md). PLAN-015 completed (production-grade Node20 GitHub Action with TypeScript, built-in agent identity loading from el-j/agency-agents, 24 unit tests, action-ci.yml CI workflow). PLAN-016 completed (release pipeline finalization: deleted conflicting version.yml+release.yml, created CHANGELOG.md, fixed downloads.md desktop links). PLAN-017 completed (fix all broken download links: nexusOrchestrator→nexus-orchestrator prefix, macOS .tar.gz→.zip, add Gatekeeper workaround instructions). PLAN-018 completed (provider visibility: configurable Ollama/LM Studio URLs, BaseURL+Error in ProviderInfo, SQLite-persisted provider CRUD, GUI provider management panel, VS Code extension with submit/queue/status-bar). PLAN-019 completed (VS Code extension VSIX in release pipeline: vsce packaging with publisher+@vscode/vsce, build-vscode job in publish.yml+ci.yml, DownloadsView.vue/HomeView.vue/docs updated to mention extension). PLAN-020 completed (fix ProviderInfo TypeScript PascalCase→camelCase type mismatch, wire AppSidebar routing, create ProvidersView.vue, dogfood confirmed COMPLETED via LM Studio qwen3-coder-next in 9s). PLAN-021 completed (SSE real-time updates via EventSource+fallback, ProviderConfig kind fix, CHANGELOG v0.8.0 — all 4 tasks dogfooded via daemon, LM Studio qwen3-coder-next). PLAN-022 completed (Universal AI Session Orchestration — AISession domain type, AISessionRepository+AISessionMonitor ports, SQLite AISessionRepo, HTTP /api/ai-sessions CRUD, MCP register_session+get_ai_sessions (14 tools total), GUI AISessionsView+useAISessions composable, VS Code SessionMonitor+Copilot detection, entry point wiring, 13 QA tests — all 9 tasks, 7 waves, all green). PLAN-023 active (System-Wide Provider Discovery + Background Service Mode — detect Claude CLI/Copilot/Antigravity/local AI tools, hide-to-tray, in-app log console, no console window — 13 tasks across 8 waves). PLAN-024 completed (Multi-Project Planning & Idea Staging — DRAFT/BACKLOG statuses, ProviderName per-task routing, Priority+Tags, SQLite migrations, backlog CRUD on HTTP/MCP/CLI/Wails, BacklogView+BacklogList+ProjectSelector GUI, TaskSubmitForm split-button, 20 new QA tests — all 12 tasks, 7 waves, all green). PLAN-029 completed (Task Queue UI fix: DashboardView flex wrapper; AI Session dedup by externalId: idempotent RegisterAISession + HeartbeatAISession endpoint + stale cleanup goroutine; VS Code extension heartbeat uses POST not re-register). PLAN-027 archived (build consolidation, CORS, Wails bindings, SessionMonitor backoff). PLAN-028 archived (health TTL cache, provider poll reduction, WorkspaceOrchView tree). PLAN-029 archived (DashboardView flex fix; AI session dedup by externalId + HeartbeatAISession endpoint + stale cleanup goroutine; VS Code heartbeat uses POST not re-register). PLAN-027 archived (build consolidation, CORS, Wails bindings, SessionMonitor backoff). PLAN-028 archived (health TTL cache, provider poll reduction, WorkspaceOrchView tree). PLAN-029 archived (DashboardView flex fix; AI session dedup by externalId + HeartbeatAISession endpoint + stale cleanup goroutine; VS Code heartbeat uses POST not re-register). PLAN-030 completed (Comprehensive Hardening: HeartbeatAISession+PromoteProvider bindings, error handling consistency, constructor nil-validation, HTTP API error format, frontend circular dep fix, VSCode memory leak+URLs, VSCode session monitor race fix, processNext decomposition into 4 helpers, silent catch blocks fixed, security hardening CSP nonce+file permissions+XSS, Vue error boundary+rejection handler, GitHub Action 53 tests, golangci-lint+eslint in CI, discovery error logging+configurable builder options, frontend accessibility ARIA labels). PLAN-031 completed (fix duplicate package decl in llm_openaicompat test, go fmt all files, add gofmt CI check + vet gate for test job — all 4 tasks green). EXPERIMENT 2026-03-12: go build passes even when _test.go files have syntax errors (build only compiles cmd/ entry points, never test files) — CI pattern Build✓ Vet✗ Test✗ gives false confidence; fixed by adding needs:[vet] gate to test job. EXPERIMENT 2026-03-12: duplicate package declarations caused by appending generated/scaffolded code to an existing file that already had a package line — always check for duplicate package decls after code generation. EXPERIMENT 2026-03-12: gofmt violations (multi-statement single lines with ;) not caught by go vet or go build — must add explicit gofmt -l check in lint CI job; find command: find . -name '*.go' | xargs gofmt -l. SESSION 2026-03-12: Completed PLAN-031 (CI hard-failure fix). Files changed: adapter_test.go (dup pkg decl), orchestrator_options_test.go (gofmt), .github/workflows/ci.yml (gofmt check + vet gate). Tests: all green. Next: PLAN-032.

PLAN-001.goal: Add MCP server inbound adapter and per-project session isolation to nexusOrchestrator

PLAN-002.goal: Harden the orchestrator against crashes/data-races and build the Wails 2 GUI dashboard with full cross-platform support

PLAN-003.goal: Dogfood PLAN-002: use nexusOrchestrator to implement its own backlog, with live progress in an embedded web dashboard

PLAN-004.goal: Context-window guard: token pre-flight check blocks tasks that would overflow the loaded model, surfacing StatusTooLarge before wasting LLM time

PLAN-005.goal: Smart multi-provider routing: per-task ModelID/ProviderHint, ActiveModel() on all adapters, FindForModel() with failover in DiscoveryService, StatusNoProvider domain constant, llm_openaicompat (OpenAI/GitHub Copilot/Azure) and llm_anthropic adapters, env-var provider config in both entry points

PLAN-006.goal: UI provider and model control: ProviderConfig domain type, RegisterCloudProvider/RemoveProvider/GetProviderModels on Orchestrator port, HTTP API CRUD endpoints for providers, enriched dashboard with task-submit form and provider management, Wails binding updates

PLAN-007.goal: Audit hardening: fix CRITICAL/HIGH security, data integrity, concurrency, error handling, and type safety issues found in comprehensive audit

PLAN-008.goal: Comprehensive E2E testing: MCP integration tests, HTTP API coverage (provider CRUD, cancel, errors), SSE event lifecycle, process-level smoke test script, and a new self-dogfood .claude/command

PLAN-009.goal: GitHub Pages documentation site + command-aware task routing: add CommandType to domain (plan/execute/auto), smart validation in orchestrator, API/MCP support, and a polished Jekyll-based GitHub Pages site with architecture docs, API reference, and getting started guide

PLAN-010.goal: Cross-platform release pipeline: GitHub Actions workflow that builds Wails desktop app (macOS/Windows/Linux) + CLI/daemon archives, publishes GitHub Releases on tags, and a polished downloads landing page on GitHub Pages

PLAN-011.goal: Industry-grade hardening: fix CI/CD workflows, add version injection, harden install script, add package doc comments, fix downloads page

PLAN-012.goal: Semantic versioning + MIT license + zig CI fix: GitVersion config, automated version tagging workflow, MIT LICENSE file, README badges

PLAN-013.goal: Update CI to latest GitHub Action versions: gittools/actions v3.1.11→v4.3.3, zig 0.13.0→0.14.0, GitVersion.yml v6 compat

PLAN-014.goal: Fix unified release pipeline: consolidate version.yml + release.yml + desktop.yml into publish.yml eliminating GITHUB_TOKEN cross-trigger limitation; fix desktop/CLI artifact naming collision; update downloads.md

PLAN-015.goal: Production-grade GitHub Action (Node20/TypeScript) with built-in agent identity loading from el-j/agency-agents, unit tests, CI workflow, and updated docs

PLAN-016.goal: Release pipeline finalization: delete conflicting version.yml+release.yml, create CHANGELOG.md, verify downloads.md desktop links

PLAN-017.goal: Fix all broken download links (nexusOrchestrator→nexus-orchestrator prefix, macOS .tar.gz→.zip) and add macOS Gatekeeper workaround instructions

PLAN-018.goal: Provider visibility, dynamic config, and VS Code extension: fix discovery for Docker/remote providers, persist provider configs in SQLite, build GUI provider management, create VS Code extension for task submission

PLAN-019.goal: Build VS Code extension VSIX in release pipeline, attach as downloadable release asset, and mention it on the GitHub Pages documentation site

PLAN-020.goal: Fix GUI provider display (ProviderInfo type mismatch), wire Providers sidebar routing, create ProvidersView, and validate dogfooding

PLAN-021.goal: SSE real-time task updates, fix ProviderConfig kind/type mismatch, CHANGELOG v0.8.0

PLAN-022.goal: Universal AI Session Orchestration — discover, visualise, and guide all active AI copilot/LLM sessions (VS Code Copilot, Claude Desktop, any MCP client) from a single nexusOrchestrator meta-orchestrator hub

PLAN-023.goal: System-Wide Provider Discovery + Background Service Mode — auto-detect all local AI tools (Claude CLI, Copilot, Antigravity, LM Studio, Ollama, etc.), hide-to-tray on window close, in-app log console, suppress console window

PLAN-024.goal: Multi-Project Planning & Idea Staging — add DRAFT/BACKLOG task statuses, per-task explicit provider routing (ProviderName), priority + tags fields, backlog CRUD across HTTP API / MCP / CLI / GUI, project-scoped backlog view with promote-to-queue workflow

PLAN-026.goal: Close the last gaps in the v0.9.x feature set: orchestrator robustness (startup recovery, retry limits, queue cap, path normalization), GUI completeness (Task History view, Settings view), and README refresh documenting v0.9.x features.
